tasks.label: flutter: clean
tasks.command: flutter clean && rm -rf build/ && rm -f pubspec.lock

tasks.label: flutter: clean, get, run -d (Linux)
tasks.command: flutter clean && rm -rf build/ && rm -f pubspec.lock && flutter pub get && flutter run -d linux

tasks.label: pwa: rebuild
tasks.command: flutter build web --release && cp serve.json build/web/

tasks.label: pwa: clean build
tasks.command: flutter clean && rm -rf build/ && rm -f pubspec.lock && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release && cp serve.json build/web/

tasks.label: pwa: watch and build
tasks.command: while true; do inotifywait -r -e modify,create,delete lib/ 2>/dev/null; echo '🔄 Rebuilding...'; flutter build web --release && cp serve.json build/web/ && echo '✅ Done!'; done

tasks.label: git: create custom tag
tasks.command: bash -c 'read -p "Enter tag name (e.g., v1.0.0): " tag; echo "Creating tag: $tag"; read -p "Push to origin? (y/n): " -n 1 -r; echo; if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then git tag $tag && git push origin $tag && echo "✅ Tag $tag created and pushed!"; else echo "❌ Cancelled"; fi'

tasks.label: git: increment minor tag (safe)
tasks.command:
bash -c '
# Находим последний валидный тег (начинается с v и имеет 3 цифровые секции)
latest=$(git tag -l | grep -E "^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$" | sort -V | tail -n1)
if [ -z "$latest" ]; then
  echo "⚠️  No valid tags found (format: vX.Y.Z)"
  echo "📝 Creating first tag: v1.0.0"
  latest="v0.0.0"
fi

clean_latest=$(echo $latest | sed "s/^v//")
IFS="." read -r major minor patch <<< "$clean_latest"
new_minor=$((minor + 1))
new="v$major.$new_minor.0"

echo "📌 Latest valid tag: $latest"
echo "🏷️  New tag: $new"
read -p "Create and push tag $new? (y/n): " -n 1 -r
echo
if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
  git tag $new && git push origin $new && echo "✅ Tag $new created and pushed!"
else
  echo "❌ Cancelled"
fi
'

tasks.label: git: increment patch tag (safe)
tasks.command:
bash -c '
# Находим последний валидный тег
latest=$(git tag -l | grep -E "^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$" | sort -V | tail -n1)
if [ -z "$latest" ]; then
  echo "⚠️  No valid tags found (format: vX.Y.Z)"
  echo "📝 Creating first tag: v1.0.0"
  latest="v0.0.0"
fi

clean_latest=$(echo $latest | sed "s/^v//")
IFS="." read -r major minor patch <<< "$clean_latest"
new_patch=$((patch + 1))
new="v$major.$minor.$new_patch"

echo "📌 Latest valid tag: $latest"
echo "🏷️  New tag: $new"
read -p "Create and push tag $new? (y/n): " -n 1 -r
echo
if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
  git tag $new && git push origin $new && echo "✅ Tag $new created and pushed!"
else
  echo "❌ Cancelled"
fi
'

tasks.label: git: increment major tag (safe)
tasks.command:
bash -c '
# Находим последний валидный тег
latest=$(git tag -l | grep -E "^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$" | sort -V | tail -n1)
if [ -z "$latest" ]; then
  echo "⚠️  No valid tags found (format: vX.Y.Z)"
  echo "📝 Creating first tag: v1.0.0"
  latest="v0.0.0"
fi

clean_latest=$(echo $latest | sed "s/^v//")
IFS="." read -r major minor patch <<< "$clean_latest"
new_major=$((major + 1))
new="v$new_major.0.0"

echo "📌 Latest valid tag: $latest"
echo "🏷️  New tag: $new"
read -p "Create and push tag $new? (y/n): " -n 1 -r
echo
if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
  git tag $new && git push origin $new && echo "✅ Tag $new created and pushed!"
else
  echo "❌ Cancelled"
fi
'

tasks.label: git: delete last tag
tasks.command: bash -c 'latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$latest" ]; then echo "No tags found"; exit 1; fi; echo "Last tag: $latest"; read -p "Delete tag $latest locally and remotely? (y/n): " -n 1 -r; echo; if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then git tag -d $latest && git push origin --delete $latest && echo "✅ Tag $latest deleted!"; else echo "❌ Cancelled"; fi'

tasks.label: git: release (patch + push + build)
tasks.command: bash -c 'latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "v.0.0.0"); new=$(echo $latest | awk -F. "{print \$1\".\"\$2\".\"\$3+1}"); echo "📌 Creating release: $new"; git tag $new && git push origin $new && echo "✅ Release $new created!"'
